description: Canonical inventory of repositories confirmed as part of the Construction OS platform.

entries.role_summary: Specification and coordination layer defining apps, workflows, role models, and runtime/kernel mappings for the Construction OS platform.
Governance-controlled intelligence curation system with evidence-linked failure/success patterns, confidence tracking, and immutable history.
Worker fleet specification and doctrine repo defining extraction workers, output contracts, and routing rules for construction signal generation.

exclusions.reason: PRE-UTK independent system. Not part of Construction OS. See ValidKernel_Registry for classification.
